scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --migrations-dir ../../packages/db/migrations && wrangler deploy

LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: LINE Messaging API channel access token (from LINE Developers Console → Messaging API → Issue)

LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET.description: LINE Messaging API channel secret (from LINE Developers Console → Basic Settings)

LINE_LOGIN_CHANNEL_ID.description: LINE Login channel ID for friend-add OAuth flow (from LINE Developers Console → LINE Login channel)

API_KEY.description: Random string used to authenticate MCP Server and Admin UI requests — generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
